name: Lifecycle Stage Velocity
description: Track how long entities spend at each lifecycle stage and surface where velocity is slowing. Most funnel analysis ignores velocity. This skill makes it the headline.
alsoSurfaces: Where in the funnel is velocity slowing systemically?
Which stages have the longest median time-at-stage?
How does velocity differ by segment and source?
Which stages get skipped most often, and what does that imply?
beforeWeRun: Time period coverage: trailing 6 or 12 months of stage transitions?
Cohort granularity for trend: weekly or monthly?
Granularity of breakdown: org + segment, or include source?

whatYoullGet.name: Headline metrics
whatYoullGet.desc: Median Lead-to-Won days, WoW delta, primary bottleneck, median skip rate.

whatYoullGet.name: Time per stage
whatYoullGet.desc: Bar chart with stages on x-axis and median time as bar height; bottleneck-flagged stages colored.

whatYoullGet.name: Stage contribution
whatYoullGet.desc: Stacked horizontal bar showing each stage's share of total funnel time.

whatYoullGet.name: Velocity trend
whatYoullGet.desc: Multi-line chart showing time-at-stage trend per stage.

whatYoullGet.name: By segment
whatYoullGet.desc: Sortable table: segments × time-at-stage per stage.

whatYoullGet.name: By source
whatYoullGet.desc: Same shape as by-segment for source.

whatYoullGet.name: Bottleneck cards
whatYoullGet.desc: Card list of flagged bottleneck stages with diagnostic context.

whatYoullGet.name: Skip-rate detail
whatYoullGet.desc: Bar chart of skip rates per stage as a data quality signal.

callout: 4 quick inputs, then Sage builds your velocity dashboard in ~10 min.
